name: Emo Capital Corp.
summary: PART I ITEM 1. DESCRIPTION OF BUSINESS Emo Capital Corp. was incorporated in the state of Nevada on August 23, 2006. The Company’s business focus is to promote and distribute health and beauty care products through the utilization of the internet. The Company (NUVI) is a premier health and beauty company that will provide an all-inclusive web Portal for its clients where customers will be able to receive Diet/Health & Fitness products., The Company also acquired the brand name of ME4Free d...
